explanation: Your age always goes up! You get older every year and never get younger!

explanation: A coin has a heads side and a tails side, but no body!

explanation: You can crack a joke, make a joke, tell a joke, and play a joke! A joke fits all these!

explanation: January, March, and July are months. Summer is a season, not a month!

explanation: We use our nose to smell. We use our tongue to taste!

explanation: Each pair has 2 shoes. 2 pairs means 2 + 2 = 4 shoes!

explanation: Tennis, Soccer, and Basketball are all sports. Painting is an art activity!

question: If today is Wednesday, what day will it be in 2 days?
explanation: Wednesday + 1 day = Thursday. Thursday + 1 day = Friday. So in 2 days it will be Friday!

explanation: A sponge is full of tiny holes, but it soaks up and holds water!

explanation: If Emma is shorter than Noah, that means Noah is taller!

explanation: Summer is the hottest season! That's when the sun shines the longest each day.

explanation: 3 red balls + 2 blue balls = 5 balls in total!
